maintenance.message: We're upgrading LeetSync! Be right back.

1.1.0: 📸 Solution Showcase Cards — share your solves as beautiful PNG images
⚔️ Friend Battle System — add rivals, compare stats, weekly challenges
🔧 Remote config: maintenance mode & update notifications
1.0.0: 🚀 Auto-push accepted LeetCode solutions to GitHub
🎨 6 extension themes (Dark Pro, Glass, Arcade, Cyberpunk, Ocean, Sakura)
📝 5 README themes for your GitHub repo
